Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roberto Ripamonti, Esq., Law Offices, 415-729-4718, for defendants and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS TURNER SHIBATA, INC. AND LENA TURNER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
